calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2010 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession;
Off Calendar Jul-13-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Dwana Simone Bain, Esq., 510-593-8679 for defendant and moving party Bundkey Bowman
Jonathan Bornstein, Esq. of Bornstein & Bornstein, 415-409-7611 for plaintiff and opposing party Grace Perkins

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT BUNDKEY BOWMAN'S Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment And Recall Writ Of Possession; IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. DEFENDANT TO FILE ANSWER PROMPTLY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)
